Resume

⬇ Download PDF

Summary

Graduate student in Ecosystem Science and Sustainability with a focus on water resources and carbon management. Integrating a proven background in business, media, and program leadership to bridge science and strategy. Passionate about transforming complex environmental data into actionable solutions that advance climate resilience.

Core Competencies

  • Data Management & Analysis
  • Environmental Policy Interpretation
  • Organizational Agility
  • Translating Complex Analyses for Broad Audiences
  • Stakeholder Engagement & Collaboration
  • Strategic Project Development & Management

Water Resources & Environmental Data Science

Water Database Specialist
March 2026 – Present
Radical Open Science Syndicate · Fort Collins, CO
  • Develop geospatial water supply databases for a National Park Service climate adaptation project
  • Apply QA/QC workflows to improve data accuracy, consistency, and usability
  • Automate data querying and visualization tasks using R scripting to improve efficiency and reproducibility
  • Collaborate with NPS staff to streamline database access and support practical use by end users
Assistant Instructor - Environmental Data Science Applications: Introduction
January 2026 – Present
Colorado State University · Fort Collins, CO
  • Selected as Assistant Instructor after completing the course based on academic performance
  • Facilitate weekly office hours providing R troubleshooting and data analysis support to students

Selected Projects — Colorado State University

Reproducible Remote Sensing Model - Restored Wetland Photosynthetic Recovery
Spring 2026
  • Built and validated a predictive model of wetland gross primary production (GPP) using HLS remote sensing data, spectral indices, and AmeriFlux ground-truth observations
  • Applied the model across restored wetland sites on Twitchell Island to assess recovery trajectories and compare seasonal carbon uptake patterns
R Shiny Application - Interactive Fen and Wetland Map
Fall 2025
  • Built an interactive Shiny application comparing three Colorado wetland and fen datasets with polygon-level queries to support transparent, data-informed environmental planning
Colorado Water Planning and Governance - Anti-Speculation Doctrine Case Analysis
Fall 2025
  • Analyzed a Colorado Supreme Court case on municipal water supply planning, demonstrating how realistic demand projections and the "can and will" test help protect shared water resources
  • Summarized takeaways for mountain communities managing growth amid climate impacts on water resources
Policy Brief - Fen Protection via Regulation 87
Fall 2025
  • Reviewed regulations and authored a policy brief to Colorado's Water Quality Control Commission advocating for stronger fen protections to safeguard water quality, drought buffering, fire resiliency, and carbon storage
  • Recommended actionable steps including avoidance standards, stewardship measures, and improved fen mapping

Professional Experience

CEO | Founder | Partner
January 2019 – May 2025
Lightswitch Video · Leadville, CO (Remote/Hybrid)
  • Led stakeholder and client meetings, translating technical needs into clear deliverables and timelines
  • Fostered strategic partnerships and negotiated contracts to support organizational growth
  • Directly grew Equinix account by 250% within four years
  • Increased company net worth from $56,879 to over $1.8 million
  • Cultivated a values-driven company culture prioritizing inclusivity and collaboration
Video Production Manager
May 2013 – January 2019
Lightswitch Video
  • Built lasting client relationships with organizations such as Chicago Tribune and Gannett
  • Hired and supervised contract teams to deliver high-quality video content for clients
  • Improved workflows through continuous process assessment
Video Production Coordinator
November 2011 – May 2013
Lightswitch Video
  • Established the Video Operations department, creating efficient workflows to scale operations
  • Collaborated across departments to improve digital infrastructure and user experience

Stream Restoration Volunteer
